Green (#8baeaa) Sea Green (#8abc8e) collapse delta-E = 5.97 full tritanopia — effectively indistinguishable. protanopia deuteranopia pair acceptable (delta-E ≈ 20–22). title: Migrating from showtext to ragg
text: tidyverse now recommends systemfonts + ragg stack custom font rendering R. previous approach — sysfonts::font_add() followed showtext::showtext_auto() — works carries significant drawback: showtext::showtext_auto() replaces R’s graphics device hooks globally, means loading hdatools silently changing rendering behavior every plot session, even plots unrelated hdatools themes.

title: Migrating from showtext to ragg
text: older showtext approach rasterizes text figure resolution bakes PDF pixels, selectable text. Fonts registered systemfonts rendered via ragg compatible device output real vector text PDFs, means text selectable, searchable, crisp zoom level. Word Typst output also benefits approach.

title: Migrating from showtext to ragg
text: systemfonts separates two concerns: font registration (hdatools’ job) device selection (consumer’s job, via Quarto knitr configuration). hdatools now registration step — calling systemfonts::register_font() bundled typeface — never touches knitr globals active graphics device.

title: Migrating from showtext to ragg
text: render plots hdatools’ bundled fonts, Quarto project must use systemfonts-aware graphics device. default Cairo device consult systemfonts registry, bundled fonts appear rendered output without change. Add following project’s _quarto.yml: sets ragg_png default knitr graphics device every chunk document. ragg_png PNG device ragg package fully systemfonts-aware. ragg package listed hdatools’ Suggests — install install.packages("ragg") already present. R Markdown documents (Quarto), set device per-chunk globally:
code: knitr:   opts_chunk:     dev: "ragg_png" knitr::opts_chunk$set(dev = "ragg_png")

title: Migrating from showtext to ragg
text: ragg uses HarfBuzz FreeType text shaping hinting, showtext uses rendering pipeline. practice produces: Slightly different character advance widths (affects line breaks text wrapping plot titles labels). Richer sub-pixel hinting screen; crisper vector text PDFs. side--side comparisons differences subtle — character spacing may shift pixel two rasterized output, wrapped labels may reflow slightly. expected acceptable rendering improvements, bugs.

title: Migrating from showtext to ragg
text: Colors — palette definitions, brand hex values, scale functions unchanged. Theme layout — margins, axis lines, gridline weights, base sizes, ggplot2::theme() elements identical previous releases. hdatools.fonts = FALSE opt-— mechanism behavior unchanged; hdatools simply uses systemfonts::register_font() internally instead sysfonts::font_add(). Font families available — Lato, Roboto Slab, Open Sans, Poppins, Noto Sans, Montserrat still bundled registered.

title: Tools and Themes for HDAdvisors Projects
text: Basic example:
code: library(hdatools) library(tidyverse)  # Create a sample dataset data <- data.frame(   x = as.character(c(1:8)),   y = runif(8, 0, 100),   group = rep(c("A", "B"), each = 4) )  # Create a plot with HDA theme and colors ggplot(data, aes(x, y, fill = group)) +   geom_col(position = "dodge") +   scale_fill_hda() +   add_zero_line() +   theme_hda() +   labs(title = "Sample Plot with HDA Theme",        subtitle = "Using *hdatools* package",        caption = "**Source:** Data source.")  # Add reliability labels to a dataset, naming the CV column (percent scale) data_with_reliability <- data |>    mutate(cv = runif(8, 0, 50)) |>    add_reliability(cv_col = cv)  # Legacy path: auto-detects a single column ending in "_cv" (0-1 proportion) data_with_legacy_cv <- data |>    mutate(value_cv = runif(8, 0, 0.5)) |>    add_reliability()  # Create a factor with custom ordering data_with_factor <- data |>    mutate(factor_col = fct_case_when(     x < 3 ~ "Low",     x < 7 ~ "Medium",     TRUE ~ "High"   ))

code: library(dplyr) #>  #> Attaching package: 'dplyr' #> The following objects are masked from 'package:stats': #>  #>     filter, lag #> The following objects are masked from 'package:base': #>  #>     intersect, setdiff, setequal, union  # Create a sample dataset of cost burden percent values set.seed(123) cost_burden <- data.frame(   pct = runif(100, min = 0, max = 1) )  # Apply fct_case_when to create labels cost_burden_label <- cost_burden |>   mutate(     cb = fct_case_when(       pct < 0.30 ~ "Not cost-burdened",       pct < 0.50 ~ "Cost-burdened",       pct >= 0.50 ~ "Severely cost-burdened"     )   )  # Check the levels of the new factor column levels(cost_burden_label$cb) #> [1] "Not cost-burdened"      "Cost-burdened"          "Severely cost-burdened"

title: Register hdatools' bundled fonts for use in plots and knitr output — register_hda_fonts

Registration can skipped setting options(hdatools.fonts = FALSE) environment variable HDATOOLS_NO_FONTS non-empty value — useful consumer wants supply font setup. bundled family registered independently. systemfonts::register_font() refuses register name already matches installed system font (e.g. Open Sans ships several common apps) — happens, function leaves one family alone (system copy resolves name anyway) still registers rest.

text: overriding strip text ggplot2 >= 4.0, use ggtext::element_markdown(), never raw ggplot2::element_text(): branded strip element ggtext markdown element, ggplot2 4.0 merges theme elements class. theme alone carries HDA's brand identity otherwise unbranded plot: bar/column fills, point colors, line colors default hda_colors["Blue"] (via ggplot2::element_geom()), discrete aes(colour =)/aes(fill =) mapping cycles full HDA palette, continuous mapping uses HDA sequential ramp (see scale_color_hda_c()) — scale_*() call required. explicit scale_*() (manual aes() value) always overrides theme-carried defaults.

title: hdatools 0.5.0
text: Fixed unwanted stroke outline geom_col()/geom_bar() bars: brand themes (theme_hda(), theme_hfv(), theme_pha(), theme_vha()) now set colour = NA ggplot2::element_geom() default instead fill color, column/bar charts longer render visible border (closes #21). get_output_format() now distinguishes "typst" "docx" output "pdf" instead folding three "pdf". “Using branded themes hdatools” article longer requires Census API key network access build — now uses small bundled data table instead live tidycensus::get_acs() call. Replaced showtext/sysfonts font stack systemfonts (ragg moved Suggests, recommended rendering device — hdatools never calls ). register_hda_fonts() now registers bundled Lato, Roboto Slab, Open Sans, Poppins, Noto Sans, Montserrat faces via systemfonts::register_font(); hdatools.fonts opt-still works way. Consumers rendering knitr/Quarto must add dev: "ragg_png" knitr: opts_chunk: _quarto.yml (see README.md) — default Cairo device consult systemfonts registry, without bundled fonts won’t appear rendered output. hdatools longer sets knitr::opts_chunk$set(fig.showtext = TRUE) load-time global side effect. Removed hda_pal_discrete(), hfv_pal_discrete(), pha_pal_discrete(), scale_color_gradient_hda(), scale_colour_gradient_hda(), scale_color_gradient_pha(), scale_colour_gradient_pha(), scale_fill_gradient_pha() — soft-deprecated 0.3.0. Use discrete scales (scale_color_hda() / scale_fill_hda() etc.) continuous ramp scales (scale_color_hda_c() / scale_fill_hda_c() etc.) introduced 0.3.0 0.4.0 respectively.

title: hdatools 0.4.0
text: New hda_focus_pal()/hfv_focus_pal()/pha_focus_pal()/vha_focus_pal() return focus/emphasis palette “highlight one series, mute rest” charts: element 1 named brand color hex, elements 2–n brand’s neutral gray. Pass directly scale_fill_manual(values = …) scale_colour_manual(values = …). New hda_span()/hfv_span()/pha_span()/vha_span() wrap text string … using named brand color, use ggtext::element_markdown() ggtext::element_textbox(). Color resolved per-brand .*_color() accessor, invalid names error valid list. New pkgdown article “CVD accessibility audit” (vignettes/articles/cvd-audit.Rmd) documents pairwise perceptual-distance (delta-E, CIE76) results four brand palettes full-severity protanopia, deuteranopia, tritanopia. Key findings: HDA Green vs Sea Green collapses delta-E ≈ 6 tritanopia (positions 2 6; use secondary encoding must appear tritanopia-sensitive chart); HFV Sky vs Grass borderline (~12 delta-E) CVD types; PHA Orange vs Red — flagged design review — passes CVD types (≥ 22). palette order changed (Q7, plans/DECISIONS.md, 2026-07-18). New tests/testthat/test-cvd.R adds colorspace::simulate_cvd()-based regression assertions guard minimum pairwise delta-E first four slots brand palette. Added VHA fourth first-class brand: theme_vha(), scale_color_vha()/ scale_fill_vha() (+ scale_colour_vha() alias), full scale_*_vha_c()/scale_*_vha_b() continuous/binned matrix, vha_colors/vha_color() — generated single .brands$vha registry entry (R/brands.R), VHA-specific code R/scales.R/ R/themes.R. Montserrat (OFL) bundled alongside existing fonts. See new pkgdown article “Adding new client brand hdatools” (vignettes/articles/adding--brand.Rmd) general pattern proves . VHA’s diverging ramp provisional — pairs Dark Turq Yellow, palette’s warm hue, Yellow’s natural HCL lightness high survive dark, saturated anchor, arm renders golden/olive rather bright yellow (sRGB gamut limit, tuning slip); candidate follow-Ramp Lab pass, HDA’s diverging ramp. theme_hda()/theme_hfv()/theme_pha() alone now brand plot scale_*() call required, via ggplot2 4.0’s theme-carried palettes: theme sets palette.colour.discrete/palette.fill.discrete brand’s full discrete palette palette.colour.continuous/ palette.fill.continuous brand’s sequential ramp (ramps behind scale_color_hda_c() friends). explicit scale_*() call (manual aes() value) always overrides theme-carried defaults, every existing plot already sets scale unaffected. three themes now set default geom fill/colour (via ggplot2::element_geom()), bare geom_bar()/geom_col()/ geom_point()/geom_line() fill/colour mapping renders brand’s first palette color instead ggplot2’s stock grey/black. Raised ggplot2 dependency floor >= 4.0.0 (>= 3.5.0), version required theme-carried palette/element_geom() features . New scale_color_hda_c()/scale_colour_hda_c()/scale_fill_hda_c() (matching hfv/pha versions) — full continuous color/fill scale matrix (9 exports) built six colorspace HCL sequential/diverging ramps tuned CVD-checked (protanopia/deuteranopia/tritanopia) Ramp Lab review (plans/ramp-lab/REVIEW.md). takes palette = c("sequential", "diverging") choose ramp, plus direction, na.value, guide. Sequential ramps default higher value = darker color; diverging ramps default ramp’s low--high arm order reviewed. HDA’s diverging ramp (Blue vs Coral) provisional — ’s near-twin PHA’s pending follow-Ramp Lab pass differentiate final adoption (plans/DECISIONS.md, 2026-07-18). New scale_color_hda_b()/scale_colour_hda_b()/scale_fill_hda_b() (matching hfv/pha versions) — binned counterpart (9 exports), defaulting n.breaks = 7, class count every ramp tuned CVD-checked . 7-class diverging maps built six ramps lose sign distinction innermost class pair protanopia (structural shared cream center) — always pair palette = "diverging" map legend direct labels (documented every new scale’s help page). scale_color_gradient_hda(), scale_color_gradient_pha(), scale_fill_gradient_pha()’s existing soft-deprecation notices now name replacement (e.g. scale_color_hda_c()) via lifecycle’s use_instead, now one exists. "Leaf" (#6fb547) "Cerulean" (#7fc7e0) join hfv_colors .brands$hfv$palette official HFV secondary colors — HFV ramps built Leaf, Cerulean approved alongside Ramp Lab sign-. HFV gets first na.value default (#d6dadd), needed now continuous scales first time; HDA/PHA already (#cfcfd0/#e2e4e3). colorspace joins Imports (used internally new ramp scales). New hda_colors, hfv_colors, pha_colors — exported named character vectors brand’s palette hex values, sourced directly internal .brands registry. Downstream consumers can now reference brand hexes name (e.g. hda_colors["Blue"]) pass full vector scale_fill_manual(values = hda_colors) without hardcoding hex strings. New hda_color(), hfv_color(), pha_color() — per-brand accessors return hex named color error list valid names unknown input.

title: hdatools 0.3.0
text: New scale_colour_hda(), scale_colour_hfv(), scale_colour_pha(), scale_colour_gradient_hda(), scale_colour_gradient_pha() — British- spelling aliases existing scale_color_*() exports, parity ggplot2’s colour/color aliasing. change existing export. hda_pal_discrete(), hfv_pal_discrete(), pha_pal_discrete(), scale_color_gradient_hda(), scale_color_gradient_pha(), scale_fill_gradient_pha() now soft-deprecated (lifecycle:: deprecate_soft()); keep working exactly , calling directly surface one-time deprecation notice. lifecycle moves Imports. Internal-: three brands’ discrete palettes, gradient stops, NA colours, select theme parameters (base_size, html_adjust, pdf_adjust, lineheight) now live one internal registry (R/brands.R), 9 exported discrete/gradient scales now thin wrappers two shared internal constructors. behavior change; every pre-refactor identity test asserting exact hex/parameter values passes unmodified. Internal-: theme_hda(), theme_hfv(), theme_pha() now thin wrappers one shared internal builder (.brand_theme() R/themes.R), reading font/margin/size parameters differ per brand R/brands.R registry. behavior change; signatures ... passthrough unchanged, every pre-refactor theme-identity test passes unmodified. pkgdown site rebuilt Bootstrap 5 (template: bootstrap: 5); reference index now groups exports Themes, Palettes & scales, Helpers, Analysis utils. Fixed “depreciated” → “deprecated” wording space parameter docs scale_color_gradient_hda(), scale_color_gradient_pha(), scale_fill_gradient_pha(). behavior change. Internal cleanup , behavior changes: enabled Roxygen markdown help pages pkgdown site render code/bold correctly, corrected get_logo() @return description, dropped unused namespace imports, added flip_gridlines()/get_logo()/get_output_format()/adjust_base_size() README, removed dead internal add_google_fonts() alias, made package startup message fire font registration actually succeeds.

title: hdatools 0.2.0
text: add_reliability() gains cv_col argument. Supplying switches new classification path: tidy-eval column selection, scale argument ("percent", default, "proportion"), <= boundaries (CV exactly 15 percent now “High”). Omitting cv_col keeps original behavior byte--byte: auto-detect single column ending _cv, treat 0-1 proportion, use strict < boundaries. flip_gridlines()’s size argument deprecated favor linewidth, matching ggplot2’s size → linewidth rename. ggiraph moves Imports Suggests. publish_plot() now errors install hint ggiraph isn’t installed, instead failing load package .

title: hdatools 0.2.0
text: Fonts bundled registered offline. inst/fonts/ ships exact static TTF faces theme_hda(), theme_hfv(), theme_pha() use (Lato, Roboto Slab, Open Sans, Poppins, Noto Sans), registered new exported register_hda_fonts() — per-session network download Google Fonts, silent failure render happens offline. Opt options(hdatools.fonts = FALSE) HDATOOLS_NO_FONTS environment variable. See inst/fonts/LICENSES.md OFL Apache 2.0 texts covering face. theme_pha() reaches parity theme_hda()/theme_hfv(): new output_format, html_adjust/pdf_adjust, ... passthrough arguments, strip.text element markdown_wrap_gen() facet labels render correctly. html_adjust/pdf_adjust default 0/0, existing theme_pha() output unchanged. theme_hda()/theme_hfv() also gain explicit html_adjust/pdf_adjust parameters (defaults match prior hardcoded behavior). get_logo() now resolves image path installed package (system.file()) instead hardcoded relative path, works correctly package installed rather source.

title: hdatools 0.2.0
text: Dropped deprecated positional scale_name argument discrete gradient scales. Renamed every deprecated size= linewidth= themes add_zero_line(). Raised ggplot2 floor >= 3.5.0 (required scale_name deprecation shape) added floors Imports, chosen every known consumer’s lockfile.

title: hdatools 0.2.0
text: Fixed broken add_reliability() README example (passed 10 values 8-row data frame relied _cv auto-detection column literally named cv). Documented strip.text overrides theme must use ggtext::element_markdown(), raw ggplot2::element_text() — ggplot2 4.0 merges theme elements class. Slimmed namespace: replaced blanket @import package imports qualified pkg:: calls throughout, keeping %+replace% rlang’s tidy-eval helpers bare imports. Fixed Authors@R given/family name order three authors. Jonathan Knopf now maintainer; Kyle Walker moves aut. Added URL/BugReports, dropped Date/LazyData, removed legacy Author: field. Removed dead data-raw/DATASET.R stub moved vignettes/branded-themes.Rmd vignettes/articles/ (pkgdown builds long-form article; never wired real package vignette).
